scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports GPA-policy notes for this school. Where the school does not publish a hard GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution, the panel says that directly instead of inventing a threshold.
policy_summary: No explicit minimum GPA is stated on the Common App school profile used in this cross-verified repair pass; Columbia instead describes a holistic review process in which every part of the application matters.

what_mit_does_say.claim: No explicit minimum GPA is stated on the Common App school profile used in this cross-verified repair pass; Columbia instead describes a holistic review process in which every part of the application matters.
